name: librust-async-executor-dev
title: librust-async-executor-dev
description:
async executors - Rust source code
async-executor provides a lighweight implementation
of asyncronous executors.
.
This package contains the source
for the Rust async-executor crate,
for use with cargo.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use librust-async-executor-dev because async executors - Rust source code.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use librust-async-executor-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair librust-async-executor-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `librust-async-executor-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
